# Pull request

Thanks for contributing. This project accepts issues first. External pull requests are not accepted unless a maintainer explicitly invited one for a specific issue.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Summary

Describe the focused change.

## Checklist

- [ ] A maintainer explicitly invited this pull request in the linked issue.
- [ ] The change is limited to the agreed scope.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Existing tests pass.
- [ ] No secrets, private prompts, or raw `.ledger/*.jsonl` records are included.
